title: Ephemeral Fireworks
description: Fires firework(s) through a command, with any color and entity.
body:
Ephemeral Fireworks

 

With the "Ephemeral Fireworks" mod, you gain the ability to command any fireworks produced by the command to any position with any color in Minecraft.

 

Usage:

/firework entity <targets> [count] [shape] [colors] [flight]

 

Example:

/firework entity @a[distance=..10] 5 2 16776960 3

 
This command launches 5 fireworks at all players within a 10-block radius with star-shaped explosions, yellow color (hex code: 16776960), and a flight duration of 3.

 

Color Reference:

- 1. Yellow: Hex Code - 16776960
- 1. Red: Hex Code - 16711680
- 1. Green: Hex Code - 65280
- 1. Blue: Hex Code - 255
- 1. Purple: Hex Code - 8388736
- 1. Orange: Hex Code - 16753920
- 1. Cyan: Hex Code - 65535
- 1. White: Hex Code - 16777215
- 1. Black: Hex Code - 0
- 1. Other Colors:
## [You can use color reference too](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/office/vba/api/excel.xlrgbcolor)
## [You can use this tool also](https://codepen.io/Densamisten/pen/XWQRaVV) 

Experiment with different color combinations to create mesmerizing fireworks displays in your Minecraft world!
